meta.name: Onboarding Drop-off Detector
meta.description: Identify where new users are dropping off in the onboarding flow, segment by cohort and plan, and alert the team with specific improvement suggestions.

parameters.content:
## 35 — Onboarding Drop-off Detector

**Required:**
- ONBOARDING_SHEET_ID: columns step_name, step_order, started, completed, segment, plan, cohort_week
- DROP_OFF_THRESHOLD_PCT: drop-off % to flag (default: 30)
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Every Monday at 10:00
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 🚪 Onboarding Drop-off {{ $json.week }}: {{ $json.flagged_count }} steps ≥{{ $json.threshold_pct }}% drop-off | Worst: {{ $json.worst_step.step_name }}
